# Chlorination

**Summary**: The addition of chlorine to water as a disinfectant and oxidant.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2011-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2011]] used chlorination to assess the formation of trihalomethanes (THMs).
